title: Meetings
text:
Optimising R code for BlueBEAR



talks

packages



James Carpenter from the BEAR Apps team in ARC speaks about how to optimise your R code for the heterogeneous BlueBEAR HPC cluster (including use on BEAR Portal). Topics include self-installing R packages and running parallel jobs.





May 19, 2026


James Carpenter












Building and maintaining a Bioconductor package: a practical guide



bioconductor



Ossama Edbali spoke about the requirements to get an R package approved for pubication in Bioconductor.





Apr 21, 2026


Ossama Edbali (Research Fellow, Computational Metabolomics)





No matching items

title: University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group
text: Welcome to the University of Birmingham R User Group — a community for students, researchers, and staff who use the R programming language for data analysis, statistics, reproducible research, and data‑driven projects. We welcome all skill levels, from complete beginners to advanced users.

title: University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group
text:
🎯 Goals

Build a supportive and inclusive community around R at the university
Share knowledge, workflows, and best practices
Promote cross‑disciplinary collaboration
Deliver hands‑on workshops and training
Support reproducible research using modern R tools
Provide a space to ask questions and get help

title: University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group
text:
📅 What We Do

✅ Monthly Meetups

Talks, tutorials, demonstrations, and lightning talks from group members.



✅ Workshops
Topics include:

Quarto and reproducible reporting
Working with large datasets
Shiny dashboards
R packages and project structure



✅ Peer Support
Bring your code, your error messages, your plots — we can try to help.


✅ Collaborative Projects
Showcase projects, shared scripts, reproducible templates, and more.

title: University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group
text:
🚀 Who Can Join?
Anyone affiliated with the university:

Undergraduate students
Postgraduates
Researchers
Academic staff
Professional services
Data analysts and developers

No prior experience necessary.

title: University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group
text:
🛠 Getting Started with R

Install R and RStudio

R: https://www.r-project.org
RStudio (Posit): https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop



Learn R

R for Data Science (free book): https://r4ds.had.co.nz
Tidyverse docs: https://www.tidyverse.org
Quarto: https://quarto.org

title: University of Birmingham (UoB) R User Group
text:
🤝 Contributing
We welcome contributions such as:

Talks (5–30 minutes)
Workshop ideas
Shared datasets
Improvements to this repository

To contribute, please open an issue or pull request, or contact the organisers.
